pr.title: Record: int5 GPTQ + Soft-Round QAT (3-seed mean 1.1162)

output.summary: int5 GPTQ with Hessian-aware compensation and Soft-Round QAT on an 11-layer 33.6M model combined with score-first AdamW TTT to hit 16MB.
techniques: Hessian-aware int5 GPTQ with column reordering and Cholesky error redistribution
Soft-Round QAT (tanh rounding with alpha 1→16) replacing STE during early int5 clipping
Score-first AdamW TTT over 131072-token chunks with cosine decay and EMA
